description: Quadcopter drone H-frame chassis lying flat on the XY plane (Z=0 to Z=3) centered at the origin, featuring two parallel side rails, a center bridging plate, four circular motor mounts at the rail ends, and eight drilled holes (four motor shaft holes and four M3 mounting holes).
components: Two parallel side rails along X (160mm x 12mm x 3mm)
Four circular motor mounts (22mm diameter, 3mm thick)
notes: The chassis is lying flat (Z=0 to Z=3). Side rails are centered at Y = -30 and Y = +30. The center plate is 50x72x3, centered at (0,0,1.5). The circular motor mounts are centered at (+/-80, +/-30). The 4 motor shaft holes (5mm diameter) are centered at (+/-80, +/-30). The 4 mounting holes (3.2mm diameter) are centered at (+/-10, +/-10). Ensure 3D boolean operations (unions and subtractions) are executed cleanly.
